label: Beta
name: v1.0.3 Beta
changes: Added fallback session creation for Chrome builds that reject strict model options.
Added one automatic retry when the Chrome local AI session is destroyed or returns an unknown session error.
Kept normal text chat separate from image input checks.
Added the emeAIDebugModel Console helper for model availability checks.
Added a toast message when Chrome local AI crashes too many times.
Added a copy button for the Windows Chrome close command inside the crash toast.
